questions.question_text: Write a précis of the following passage in about 120 words and suggest a suitable title: During my vacation last May, I had a hard time choosing a tour...Back at home, I really missed the place and I would of course look forward to the next trip to another exotic place.
Read the following passage carefully and answer the questions that follow: The New Year is the time for resolution...Perhaps it will solve my problem, but I just have not had time to read it.
Correct only FIVE of the following: We were staying at my sister’s cape’s code vacation home...(Other sentences requiring correction)
Choose the punctuation mark that is needed in each of the following sentences: “It isn’t fair!” shouted Martin...(Other sentences requiring punctuation)
Choose the analogy of the words written in capital letters (Any five). Example: SLAPSTICK : LAUGHTER...(Other analogy questions)
Rewrite the following dialogue, written in indirect speech, in a paragraph form: Helen: Mr West, what's happened to John?...Mr West: I don't know.
Explain the difference between the following word pairs by using each word in your own sentences (Any five): Example: Adverse, averse...(Other word pairs)
Use any FIVE of the following in sentences which illustrate their meaning: Example: Smash hit...(Other phrases)
Translate the following Urdu paragraph into English by keeping in view figurative/idiomatic expression. ﻋﺎم ﻟﻮﮔﻮں ﮐﺎ ﺧﯿﺎل ﮨﮯ ﮐہ ﻣُﻠﮏ ﮐﮯ ﻗﺎﻧﻮن اور ﻓﺮد ﮐﯽ آزادی اﯾﮏ دوﺳﺮے ﮐﯽ ﺿﺪ ﮨﻮﺗﮯ ﮨﯿﮟ۔...
